title: 'God will punish him': Karnataka social welfare department official dies by suicide, blames senior
content: A 60-year-old assistant director, set to retire soon, was found dead in his office in Pavagada. In a WhatsApp video, he blamed his joint director for harassment, stating it pushed him to commit suicide. Police have registered an abetment case against the joint director based on a complaint by the deceased's wife.

title: 'Biwi ki suno sirf toh ...': Newlywed Kuldeep Yadav makes honest admission
content: At the Times of India Sports Awards 2025, Kuldeep Yadav and Harmanpreet Kaur won Cricketer of the Year. Spinner Kuldeep impressed with match-winning spin performances, while batter Harmanpreet led with aggressive captaincy and consistency. The awards reflected Indian cricket’s strong 2025, with both teams achieving success and rising global dominance.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX sends email to FCC, says reject Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin application
content: SpaceX has formally responded to Amazon's FCC petition against its satellite data center proposal. SpaceX argues that if Amazon's criticisms are applied, they must also be applied to Blue Origin's similar satellite data center application. SpaceX is pushing for equitable treatment and consistent review of both companies' plans.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office collection day 3: Film crosses Rs 500 crore mark
content: Ranveer Singh's spy thriller 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has shattered box office records, crossing the ₹500 crore mark globally in just three days. The Aditya Dhar-directed film, following the journey of an undercover spy infiltrating Lyari's underworld, has garnered immense audience appreciation for its high-octane action and compelling narrative.

title: CSK's playing XI for IPL 2026: MS Dhoni as impact sub, no place for Sarfaraz?
content: Chennai Super Kings gear up for IPL 2026 with a new look, led by Ruturaj Gaikwad. A blockbuster trade brings Sanju Samson aboard, while young talents like Ayush Mhatre and Kartik Sharma are set to shine. Despite Nathan Ellis's injury, CSK boasts a balanced squad, aiming for a record sixth title.

title: Google announces it is shutting down Firebase Studio, less than a year after its launch
content: Google is shutting down its Firebase Studio AI workspace on March 22, 2027, less than a year after its April 2025 launch. The company is consolidating its AI developer offerings, moving lessons learned into Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity. Core Firebase services remain unaffected, with a year-long transition period for users.

title: '2-3 hazaar run': 14-yr-old Sooryavanshi sets sky-high IPL 2026 target - watch
content: Young batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, fresh off a U-19 World Cup triumph, is set to debut in IPL 2026 with Rajasthan Royals. Despite immense expectations, the 14-year-old displayed remarkable wit at a team event, humorously deflecting questions about personal run targets. He emphasised focusing on the team's process and winning trophies, showcasing a maturity beyond his years.

title: Commercial LPG quota hiked, relief for eateries
content: In a move to uplift the food and hospitality industry amidst ongoing challenges, the government has raised commercial LPG cylinder allocations by 20%, effectively restoring them to 50% of pre-conflict levels. Starting Monday, this supply boost will directly benefit restaurants, hotels, and food processing businesses, ensuring they have the resources they need.

title: Yrs after Zuckerberg called it 'next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform, a significant metaverse investment, struggled to gain traction and will transition to a mobile-only experience. This move aims to streamline Meta's VR offerings and focus development efforts.

title: Feeling dizzy when you stand up quickly? What it may reveal about blood pressure and hydration
content: Feeling lightheaded when you get up too quickly? Doctors note that this can be indicative of fluctuations in blood pressure or circulation changes. Though it usually isn't a cause for concern, if it happens often, it could reveal deeper health issues. Adopting measures like rising gradually and ensuring you drink enough fluids can enhance your cardiovascular wellness and stability.

title: Foggy morning gives Delhi Jan-like feeling in March
content: Delhi woke up to a scene reminiscent of January, shrouded in a heavy fog after an unprecedented day of downpour. Meteorologists explain that the fog is a product of lingering moisture from the rainfall, coupled with humid winds and the cooling effect of a clear night sky.

title: Virat Kohli ‘had cricket left’ in Tests, Ashwin reveals private chat
content: Virat Kohli's unexpected Test retirement in IPL 2025 followed intensified scrutiny over his form, particularly after a challenging tour of Australia. Despite a return to domestic cricket, the expected resurgence didn't materialize. Former teammate Ravichandran Ashwin believes Kohli still had Test cricket left in him, highlighting the batter's team-first principles and the difficulty of such a decision.

title: What went wrong with Luana Carolina's weight cut? UFC London fight off
content: UFC London lost one fight after Luana Carolina missed weight by 8 pounds, leading to the cancellation of her bout with Melissa Mullins. Ravena Oliveira also missed weight but will still compete with a penalty, as per MMA Junkie. Despite this setback, the main card remains strong, with Movsar Evloev and Lerone Murphy headlining the event.

title: Jared Goff’s Detroit Lions tied to $156 million Buffalo Bills defensive end
content: The Detroit Lions are projected to acquire Buffalo Bills defensive end Joey Bosa. Analysts suggest Bosa could be an affordable and impactful addition to complement their in-house edge Aidan Hutchinson on the Lions’ defensive line, especially for head coach Dan Campbell. Despite recent performance dips and injury concerns, his veteran presence and disruptive ability are seen as valuable assets for any NFL team, in particular, a team like Detroit. He could be paired with Hutchinson on the gridiron.

title: Fortnite Showdown power hour: Start timings for all regions
content: Fortnite's Chapter 7 Season 2, Showdown, brings two Power Hour events on March 21, 2026, offering players a chance to grab exclusive rewards like Dark Voyager's Obliterator weapon.  These hour-long sessions, starting at 3:30 PM ET and 9:30 PM ET, ensure global accessibility with staggered timings. Don't miss this unique opportunity for in-game advantages.

title: TOISA 2025: A grand roll call of excellence in Indian sports
content: The Times of India Sports Awards 2025 showcased a grand celebration of Indian sporting excellence, bringing together top athletes, legends, and officials under one roof. The event highlighted outstanding achievements across disciplines, honouring dedication, performance, and resilience. With inspiring moments and recognition of emerging and established stars alike, it reflected India’s growing stature in global sports and its deep talent pool.

title: Why Kerala's 'semi-final' verdict has put Left on red alert ahead of April 9 polls
content: Local body poll results in Kerala signal a potential shift, with the Congress-led UDF gaining momentum against the ruling LDF. The UDF secured key urban strongholds, raising concerns about anti-incumbency for Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan's government. The BJP also shows strategic expansion, hinting at a more competitive assembly election.

title: Iran’s 21-day assault: Full list of US military losses and damage
content: Iran's escalating strikes have inflicted significant operational and reputational costs on the US and Israel, resulting in the loss of over two dozen aircraft and advanced military systems. Relatively low-cost Iranian tactics have successfully targeted expensive US assets, including THAAD radar and an F-35 fighter, raising concerns about modern warfare vulnerabilities.

title: 'I don’t want to force it': Stephen Curry on new step with Ayesha Curry
content: ​Stephen Curry, the Golden State Warriors’ star player and NBA legend, and his wife, Ayesha Curry, seem to have built a pretty strong marriage over the last decade that they have been together as they have become parents to four young children. While the two continue to keep their lives private, Stephen Curry opens up about his hesitation of taking the next step alongside his wife, Ayesha Curry.

title: 'Dhurandhar' day 3: Ranveer Singh film nets Rs 240 cr; eyes to cross Rs 300 cr globally
content: Directed by Aditya Dhar, the high-octane sequel 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is rewriting box office history, netting a staggering Rs. 246.99 crore in just 60 hours. Following the massive success of the 2025 original, the Ranveer Singh-starrer opened to a record-breaking Rs. 102.55 crore on Day 1, maintaining an iron grip on the domestic market despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime. Upped by the festive Ugadi and Gudi Padwa window, the espionage thriller has seen a massive Saturday surge, with Day 3 morning shows alone raking in Rs. 20.72 crore across 6,622 screenings.

title: NHL isider Elliotte Friedman clarifies Toronto Maple Leafs' stance on forward Matthew
content: Contrary to fan speculation, NHL insider Elliotte Friedman clarified that trade talks involving Matthew Knies were not about dissatisfaction with the player. The Maple Leafs were merely assessing his market value, with teams like the Ducks and Devils showing serious interest. Knies remains a highly valued young forward for Toronto.

title: Afghan player who warned Pak after Kabul attack celebrates with IPL team
content: The celebration took place during a practice session, where players and support staff gathered to mark the occasion.

title: ‘Winter is coming,’ spring is not: Why India’s Rituraj is losing its throne
content: India's cherished spring, once a gentle interlude, is rapidly vanishing.  Winters are warming, heat arrives earlier, and the transition season is shrinking, impacting cultural traditions and agriculture.  Recent years show a disturbing pattern of early heatwaves and record temperatures, signalling a profound shift in the climate. This loss affects not just weather but the very rhythm of life.

title: Ashley Rebello says Karisma tracked Raveena Tandon’s costumes via aide
content: Costume designer Ashley Rebello revealed that the off-screen rivalry between Karisma Kapoor and Raveena Tandon during 'Andaz Apna Apna' extended to their on-screen costumes. Rebello detailed how he enhanced Raveena's nighties for a song, making them more elaborate than Karisma's. He also noted Karisma's team closely monitored Raveena's styling.

title: LeBron James has scary face-off with alligator on golf course—walks away just in time
content: Basketball superstar LeBron James had a close encounter with a sneaky alligator while golfing with his son. Spotting the reptile near a pond where his ball landed, James wisely chose to abandon the ball rather than risk a dangerous confrontation. He demonstrated real-life smarts by prioritizing safety over retrieving his golf ball.

title: In call with PM Modi, Iran prez calls on India-chaired Brics to play role in halting war
content: Iranian President Pezeshkian urged the India-led BRICS to play an independent role in halting aggressions against Iran amid escalating Middle East tensions. He highlighted alleged US and Israeli "unlawful attacks" and crimes, emphasizing Iran's opposition to nuclear weapons. PM Modi condemned attacks on energy infrastructure and called for dialogue and peace.

title: UK says Cyprus bases won't be used for Iran attacks
content: Britain has assured Cyprus its military bases won't be used for offensive action in the Iran conflict, despite bolstering island defenses after a drone incident. Prime Minister Starmer conveyed this commitment, emphasizing Cyprus's security. This comes as the UK allows limited US defensive use of other bases, drawing warnings from Iran.

title: A Rajya Sabha rummy: How BJP manages ‘floating majority’ with bellwether backings
content: ​When the BJP swept to power in 2014 with a decisive majority in the Lok Sabha, it did not carry that dominance into the Rajya Sabha. The Upper House, by design, is insulated from electoral waves. Its members are elected by state assemblies, and their terms are staggered, ensuring continuity and preventing sudden shifts. This meant that even as the BJP commanded brute strength in the Lower House, it remained a minority in the Upper House for years. That imbalance mattered!

title: Texas upsets Zags, caps improbable Sweet 16 run
content: Texas became the first team in five years to go from the NCAA tournament's First Four to the Sweet 16, beating Gonzaga 74-68 on Saturday.

title: Sources: UNC, Davis discussing future after loss
content: UNC officials are in discussions with coach Hubert Davis about the coach's future after another first-round loss in the NCAA tournament.

title: Sources: Doncic wants child support filing nixed
content: Luka Dončić has filed documents to dismiss a petition filed by his ex-fiancée that is seeking child support for their two daughters and attorney fees, sources told ESPN's Dave McMenamin.

title: Brady shines, Team USA dominates flag football
content: Tom Brady started out like the GOAT of flag football before Team USA dominated the Fanatics Flag Football Classic on Saturday.

title: Michigan handles Saint Louis to make Sweet 16
content: Yaxel Lendeborg's 25-point outing helped Michigan, the Midwest Region's top seed, power past Saint Louis on Saturday and advance to the Sweet 16.

title: USC saved by review, then topples Clemson in OT
content: Saved by a review that nullified Clemson's buzzer-beater at the end of regulation, USC went on to win 71-67 in overtime to advance to the second round of the women's NCAA tournament.

title: Chelsea boss hurt after 'most disappointing' loss
content: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior admitted he was hurt by another defeat after labeling the 3-0 loss at Everton as "the most disappointing evening so far."

title: Mainieri out as South Carolina's baseball coach
content: Paul Mainieri is out as South Carolina's baseball coach midway through his second season after he couldn't approach the level of success he had produced at LSU.

title: T.N. Assembly election: For second time, Pottalurani residents to boycott polls over fish waste processing units
content: The residents have been demanding the closure of fish waste processing units near the village since 2019, and have submitted multiple petitions in this regard. However, the protest intensified in early 2024 ahead of the Lok Sabha election

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI(M) State Committee stands firmon six seats
content: The CPI(M)’s contention is that it had been promised an increase in the seats for the 2021 Tamil Nadu Assembly election by the DMK leadership. On the other hand, the DMK argues that it has included more political parties in the alliance and is likely to lose 15 constituencies from its share.

title: T.N. Assembly election: parties must avoid excessive freebies, focus on development, says ex-Minister Semmalai
content: Contending that these handouts being announced as part of electoral promises by major parties will not facilitate T.N.’s development, he criticises the DMK government for not increasing the capital expenditure substantially over the last 5 years and ‘frittering away’ funds for distributing freebies

title: No blanket exemption for women teachers above 50 from SIR and census: Revenue Department
content: A senior woman teacher at a government school in Bengaluru says that teachers will meet School Education and Literacy Minister Madhu Bangarappa and seek a blanket exemption again.

content: Jharkhand Chief Minister asserted that had nature not existed, there would be no living beings neither humans nor animals in the world

content: The removal of the caps, introduced when widespread cancellation of IndiGo flights triggered a spike in fares, comes at a time when West Asia conflict has led to increase in aviation turbine fuel (ATF)

content: The Chief Minister started his budget presentation by accusing the BJP for not supporting the State’s interests; Milk procurement price hiked by ₹10

title: A game of four
content: The Tamil Nadu Assembly election will see a four-cornered contest this April. As the DMK and its allies and the AIADMK and its partners remain the principal participants of the big fight, it is also clear that the newly formed Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam and the steady presence of the Naam Tamizhar Katchi in electoral politics will have roles to play. This report analyses the political situation ahead of this election that entices voters with the promise that it will be like nothing the State has never seen so far

content: Ambekar framed the RSS’s approach to caste through social harmony rather than structural confrontation (File photo) Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. title: Musk Offers To Pay US Airport Staff Worker's Salaries Amid Funding Standoff
content: Tech tycoon Elon Musk offered Saturday to pay security personnel at US airports during a political standoff over funding for the Department of Homeland Security (DHS).

title: Video: Iranian Missile Hits Jerusalem, Lands Metres From Al-Aqsa Mosque On Eid al-Fitr
content: Israel said that an Iranian missile had struck Jerusalem during Eid celebrations, just metres away from some of the holiest sites in the world.

title: Amid Hormuz Crisis, PM Speaks To Iran President, Stresses Open Shipping Lanes

title: Why Hitting The UAE Hurts Washington Fastest In Iran's Playbook

title: Reranking the 32 men's teams left in March Madness
content: we're back to rank the remaining 32 teams in the 2026 men's NCAA tournament . this season, the answer is complicated, partly because we don't know who will be available for the second round . the top four seeds in each region went 4-0 in the round of 64 .

title: Women's March Madness live updates: Follow all of Saturday's first-round action
content:
The Madness is here! After a thrilling first day, 32 more teams are in action in the 2026 women's NCAA tournament, all airing on ESPN networks. We're tracking all 16 games from Storrs, Connecticut, to Los Angeles. Follow along as our reporters track the live action as the first round comes to a close. Saturday's schedule starts now: (15) High Point vs. (2) Vanderbilt:  7 p.m., ESPNEWS 
 (9) Princeton vs. (8) Oklahoma State:  7:30 p.m., ESPN2 
 (10) Colorado vs. (7) Illinois:  9:30 p.m., ESPN2 
 (16) California Baptist vs. (1) UCLA:  10 p.m., ESPN

title: Men's March Madness live tracker: Updates on Saturday's games
content: The 2026 men's NCAA tournament has whittled to 32 teams that have their eyes set on the Sweet 16. ESPN reporters are on-site, from Buffalo to Portland, to give you a real-time look at the Madness. Follow along as they and the rest of the staff track every second-round game on Saturday. title: Women's March Madness Day 2 takeaways: How UConn, USC, Virginia won
content: the first round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway . we're tracking how every team won Saturday, from upsets to blowouts . our experts' takes on each winner's chances to advance to the Sweet 16 .

title: Power Rankings: New 1-32 poll, points pace vs. preseason projections
content: a panel of ESPN hockey commentators, analysts, reporters and editors send in a 1-32 poll based on the games through Wednesday . we have listed each team's preseason over/under total (per DraftKings Sportsbook) as well as its current points pace .
